scripts.build: bun run --filter jilatax build && bun run --filter @jilatax/svg build && bun run --filter @jilatax/cli build && bun run --filter create-jilatax build
scripts.check: bun run --filter jilatax check && bun run --filter @jilatax/svg check && bun run --filter @jilatax/cli check && bun run --filter create-jilatax check
